texto: I circle around them, my sword pointed in their direction. "Hermes Trismegistus. Ostanes the Persian. Olympiodorous of Thebes---" I stop, feeling like an idiot. These necromancers and the ridiculous names they give themselves. They're always trying to outdo one another. "You five," I said instead. "By the authority of King Malcolm of Anglia, I am commanded to arrest you for the crime of witchcraft.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Virginia Boecker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “I circle around them, my sword pointed in their direction. "Hermes Trismegistus. Ostanes the Pers…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, elizabeth-grey, funny pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de funny e the-witch-hunter.
